---
title: "[Martin Søyland]{.neuorange}"
---

![](martigso2.png){width=25%}
    
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| results: asis
glue::glue("{mortar_board} {position}
           {department_store} {department}
           {cityscape} {employer}
           {email} {emaillink}",
           position = "Researcher\n",
           employer = "University of Oslo\n",
           department = "Department of political science\n",
           mortar_board = emo::ji("mortar_board"),
           department_store = emo::ji("department_store"),
           cityscape = emo::ji("cityscape"),
           email = emo::ji("email"),
           emaillink = "[martin.soyland@stv.uio.no](mailto:martin.soyland@uio.no)\n")
```

`r emo::ji("scroll")` [Complete CV here!](./cv/soyland_cv.pdf)

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

library(httr2)

pubs_cache <- "pubs_cache.rds"
if (file.exists(pubs_cache) && difftime(Sys.time(), file.mtime(pubs_cache), units = "hours") < 24) {
  pubs_raw <- readRDS(pubs_cache)
} else {
  pubs_raw <- request("https://api.nva.unit.no/search/resources?contributor=619119&size=50") |>
    req_perform() |>
    resp_body_json(simplifyVector = FALSE)
  saveRDS(pubs_raw, pubs_cache)
}

type_colors <- list(
  AcademicArticle   = "#E39F0B",
  AcademicChapter   = "#009970",
  ReportResearch    = "#b7bdf7",
  MediaInterview    = "#0095A8",
  Lecture           = "#F0F1EB",
  OtherPresentation = "#F0F1EB"
)

type_labels <- list(
  AcademicArticle   = "Article",
  AcademicChapter   = "Chapter",
  ReportResearch    = "Report",
  MediaInterview    = "Media",
  Lecture           = "Lecture",
  OtherPresentation = "Panel"
)

get_venue <- function(ctx) {
  switch(ctx$type %||% "",
    Journal           = ctx$name                          %||% NA_character_,
    Report            = ctx$publisher$name                %||% NA_character_,
    Anthology         = ctx$entityDescription$mainTitle   %||% NA_character_,
    Event             = ctx$name                          %||% NA_character_,
    MediaContribution = ctx$disseminationChannel          %||% NA_character_,
    NA_character_
  )
}

html_esc <- function(s) {
  if (is.null(s) || is.na(s)) return("")
  s <- gsub("&", "&amp;", s, fixed = TRUE)
  s <- gsub("<", "&lt;",  s, fixed = TRUE)
  s <- gsub(">", "&gt;",  s, fixed = TRUE)
  s <- gsub('"', "&quot;", s, fixed = TRUE)
  s
}

pubs <- lapply(pubs_raw$hits, function(hit) {
  ed  <- hit$entityDescription
  ref <- ed$reference
  doi <- ref$doi %||% NA_character_
  nva_url <- if (!is.null(hit$identifier)) {
    paste0("https://nva.sikt.no/registration/", hit$identifier)
  } else NA_character_
  list(
    title   = ed$mainTitle                        %||% NA_character_,
    year    = ed$publicationDate$year             %||% NA_character_,
    type    = ref$publicationInstance$type        %||% NA_character_,
    venue   = get_venue(ref$publicationContext),
    authors = paste(sapply(ed$contributorsPreview, function(c) c$identity$name %||% NA_character_), collapse = ", "),
    url     = if (!is.na(doi)) doi else nva_url
  )
})

pubs <- pubs[order(sapply(pubs, function(p) as.integer(p$year %||% "0")), decreasing = TRUE)]

make_hex <- function(pub, i) {
  color <- type_colors[[pub$type]] %||% "#B8B8B8"
  lbl   <- type_labels[[pub$type]] %||% gsub("([a-z])([A-Z])", "\\1 \\2", pub$type) %||% NA_character_
  pos   <- if (i %% 2 == 1) "up" else "down"

  venue_str   <- if (is.na(pub$venue)) "" else html_esc(pub$venue)
  tooltip_str <- html_esc(paste0(
    pub$title, " \u2014 ", pub$authors,
    if (!is.na(pub$venue)) paste0(" \u2014 ", pub$venue) else ""
  ))

  meta <- paste0(
    '<span class="hex-pub-title">', html_esc(pub$title), '</span>',
    '<span class="hex-pub-venue">', venue_str, '</span>'
  )

  top_label <- if (pos == "up") {
    paste0('<div class="hex-label hex-label-top">', meta, '</div>')
  } else {
    '<div class="hex-label hex-label-top"></div>'
  }

  bottom_label <- if (pos == "down") {
    paste0('<div class="hex-label hex-label-bottom">', meta, '</div>')
  } else {
    '<div class="hex-label hex-label-bottom"></div>'
  }

  hex_shape <- paste0(
    '<div class="hex-shape" style="background-color:', color, '" title="', tooltip_str, '">',
    '<div class="hex-content">',
    '<span class="hex-year">', html_esc(pub$year %||% ""), '</span>',
    '<span class="hex-type">', html_esc(lbl), '</span>',
    '</div></div>'
  )

  hex_shape <- if (!is.na(pub$url)) {
    paste0('<a href="', pub$url, '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">', hex_shape, '</a>')
  } else {
    hex_shape
  }

  paste0('<div class="hex-item hex-', pos, '">', top_label, hex_shape, bottom_label, '</div>')
}

hex_items <- mapply(make_hex, pubs, seq_along(pubs), SIMPLIFY = TRUE)

cat('<div class="hex-timeline-outer">\n<div class="hex-timeline">\n')
cat(paste(hex_items, collapse = "\n"))
cat('\n</div>\n</div>\n')
```

<!-- # CV

[View complete academic CV!](/cv/soyland_cv.pdf) -->
